global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a clear promotional message.

elements.label: Solid orange background
elements.description: A vibrant solid orange background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: QuickFork logo
elements.description: A simple logo with the text 'QuickFork' in a bold font, positioned at the top center.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small circular badge with the word 'SALE' in white text, located at the top right corner.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label with the text 'UGC' in white, positioned at the top left corner.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small circular element that is not clearly defined, located in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Bold white text stating '2-for-1 tonight' with a smaller line below it saying 'Fresh favorites nearby'.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A prominent price tag displaying '€19.99' in white text, located at the bottom left.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A button with the text 'Book now' in white, positioned at the bottom center.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, QuickFork, 2-for-1 offer
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo and sale badge are at the top, the main offer text is centered, and the price and CTA are at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: QuickFork, SALE, UGC, 2-for-1 tonight, Fresh favorites nearby, €19.99, Book now
